ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., AFC East) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NFL) */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Current head coach of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "super_bowl_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the Super Bowl */,
  "super_bowl_loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that lost the Super Bowl */,
  "season_notes" TEXT /* Notable events or changes during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_super_bowl_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("super_bowl_loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_super_bowl_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("super_bowl_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "dsrs" REAL /* Defense-Adjusted Simple Rating System (DSRS) */,
  "mov" REAL /* Margin of Victory (MoV) */,
  "osrs" REAL /* Offense-Adjusted Simple Rating System (OSRS) */,
  "pa" INTEGER /* Points Against (PA) */,
  "pd" INTEGER /* Point Differential (PD) */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Points For (PF) */,
  "srs" REAL /* Simple Rating System (SRS) */,
  "sos" REAL /* Strength of Schedule (SoS) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_loss_percentage" TEXT /* Win-Loss Percentage (W-L%) */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the division */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance per game */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total offensive yards gained */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers (fumbles + interceptions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., AFC East) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the division belongs to (e.g., AFC) */,
  "division_champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the division that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_division_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_champion_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., AFC) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the conference belongs to (e.g., NFL) */,
  "conference_champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the conference that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_conference_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_champion_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NFL) */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Current commissioner of the league */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)
column_names: Division the team belongs to (e.g., AFC East)
Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC)
League the team belongs to (e.g., NFL)
Current head coach of the team
